boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-XOR-078 mismatches batch X-78; STD-XOR-078-P requires exact match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Closure covers X-79 not X-78; exact match required.

final_answer: The clinical batch release cannot proceed. The deviation closure document (CLOSE-XOR-078) references batch X-79, which does not match the target batch X-78. Policy STD-XOR-078-P mandates an exact match for batch, assay, criterion, and release date. Since this condition is not met and a visible deviation remains, the source boundary is not closed. Escalate for defect resolution.
open_blockers: Batch ID mismatch X-78 vs X-79
